entry.title: BingX Empfehlungscode: TXXS5I (Aktualisieren Sie den BingX Promocode 2024)
entry.content:
BingX Empfehlungscode: TXXS5I (Aktualisieren Sie den BingX Promocode 2024)

Suchen Sie nach BingX Empfehlungscodes? Das neueste für 2024 ist "TXXS5I". Wenn Sie diesen Code verwenden, erhalten Sie 25 % Rabatt auf Handelsgebühren. Darüber hinaus können neue BingX-Benutzer, sich mit dem Aktionscode "TXXS5I" registrieren, eine exklusive Werbeprämie von bis zu 5.125 USDT erhalten.

Was ist der BingX Empfehlungscode?
Der Code „TXXS5I“ innerhalb der BingX-App fungiert als Empfehlungscode. Durch Verwendung dieses Codes erhalten Sie einen kontinuierlichen Rabatt auf Handelsgebühren sowie eine Ermäßigung von 25 % auf Ihre Trades. Darüber hinaus haben Sie durch Weitergabe Ihres Empfehlungscodes an Freunde Möglichkeit, eine Prämie von bis zu 5125 USDT zu verdienen. Dies stellt eine fantastische Gelegenheit dar, Gebühren zu sparen und möglicherweise Ihre Einnahmen zu steigern, während Sie anderen Plattform vorstellen.

Was ist der BingX Empfehlungscode im Jahr 2024?
Der Top-BingX Empfehlungscode für 2024 ist „TXXS5I“. Mit diesem Code sparen Sie fortlaufend Handelsgebühren und erhalten 25 % Rabatt auf Ihre Transaktionen. Wenn Sie Ihren Empfehlungscode außerdem mit Freunden teilen, können Sie einen Bonus von bis zu 50 % verdienen.

Darüber hinaus können Sie durch Registrierung mit dem BingX Empfehlungscode TXXS5I ein Geschenk im Wert von bis zu 5125 USDT erhalten. Zögern Sie nicht; Handel jetzt! Melden Sie sich an, fordern Sie Ihre Prämien an und tauchen Sie ein in das Handelserlebnis auf BingX Exchange.

Wie finde ich den BingX Empfehlungscode?
Der wichtigste zu verwendende BingX Empfehlungscode ist TXXS5I. Bei Verwendung dieses Codes erhalten Sie einen Anmeldebonus im Wert von 100 $. Darüber hinaus können Sie sich durch Weitergabe Ihres Codes an Freunde eine Provision von 50 % sichern. Folglich können Sie als Willkommensanreiz den höchsten Anmeldebonus von bis zu 100 US-Dollar in USDT erhalten. Es stellt eine außergewöhnliche Möglichkeit dar, Ihre Handelsexpedition mit zusätzlichen Vorteilen zu beginnen und gleichzeitig andere einzuladen, daran teilzunehmen und ihre eigenen Belohnungen zu ernten.

Wie verwende ich den BingX Empfehlungscode?
BingX, auch bekannt als Bingbon, fungiert als globale Handelsplattform und bietet eine Reihe digitaler Vermögenswerte, Derivate und Spothandelsoptionen. Sein Hauptziel besteht darin, Benutzern eine erstklassige und äußerst sichere Handelsumgebung bereitzustellen.

BingX zeichnet sich insbesondere durch seine Copy-Trading-Funktion aus und positioniert sich als prominenter Akteur in diesem Bereich. automatische Copy-Trading-Funktion ist bahnbrechend und ermöglicht es Händlern, Strategien erfahrener Profis mühelos mit einem einzigen Klick zu reproduzieren. Mit diesem optimierten Tool können Benutzer potenzielle Gewinne erzielen, indem sie professionelle Handelstaktiken nachahmen.

Derzeit richtet sich BingX an ein großes Publikum in mehr als 100 Ländern und Regionen, darunter Nationen wie Vereinigten Staaten, Kanada, Australien und EU.

Was BingX auszeichnet, ist No-KYC-Anforderung (Know Your Customer), den Benutzer-Onboarding-Prozess rationalisiert. Insbesondere erhielt Plattform im Jahr 2021 Anerkennung und erhielt angesehene Auszeichnung „Best Exchange Broker“ von TradingView, was ihre Zuverlässigkeit und Glaubwürdigkeit unterstreicht.

Seien Sie versichert, dass Erstellung eines kostenlosen Kontos heute nicht nur Zugriff gewährt, sondern auch einen kostenlosen BingX-Anmeldebonus sichert. Es dient als Portal zur Erkundung einer Plattform, für ihre Innovation und strengen Sicherheitsmaßnahmen bekannt ist.

So registrieren Sie sich für BingX mit dem Empfehlungscode „TXXS5I“:
Schritt 1: Klicken Sie auf den Link: BingX Sign Up
Schritt 2: Geben Sie Registrierungs-E-Mail-Informationen ein und wählen Sie ein Passwort.
Schritt 3: Überprüfen Sie, ob der Code „TXXS5I“ im Feld „Empfehlungscode (optional)“ angezeigt wird. Wenn nicht, geben Sie es bitte ein.
Schritt 4: Stimmen Sie der Kundenvereinbarung und der Datenschutzrichtlinie zu.
Schritt 5: Klicken Sie auf „Anmelden“.

Wie melde ich mich an und wende den BingX Empfehlungscode an?
1) Rufen Sie zunächst über den bereitgestellten Link BingX-Website auf und erstellen Sie ein Konto.
2) Alternativ besuchen Sie den Google Play Store und laden Sie BingX-App auf Ihr Smartphone herunter.
3) Registrieren Sie sich als Nächstes entweder mit Ihrer E-Mail-Adresse oder Handynummer, richten Sie ein Passwort ein, geben Sie einen Empfehlungscode wie TXXS5I ein und geben Sie den Bestätigungscode ein.
4) Stellen Sie sicher, dass Sie den BingX-Empfehlungscode verwenden: TXXS5I, um bis zu 100 $ und 25 % Gebührenrabatt beim kostenlosen Handel zu erhalten.
5) Sobald der Empfehlungscode angewendet wurde, klicken Sie auf „Senden“, um einen Bestätigungscode für Ihr Konto zu erhalten.
6) Anschließend erhalten Sie eine Willkommensbonusnachricht und werden zum Belohnungsbereich weitergeleitet.
7) Fahren Sie fort, indem Sie weitere Vermögenswerte von Ihrem privaten Schließfach oder Bankkonto hinzufügen. Navigieren Sie dann zur Kryptoseite, um mit dem Handel zu beginnen.
😎Sobald Sie Hauptseite erreicht haben, werden Sie auf eine Vielzahl von Kryptowährungen stoßen; Investieren Sie Ihr Geld in eines davon.
9) Behalten Sie den Markt im Auge und verkaufen Sie Ihre Währung, wenn ihr Wert steigt, damit Sie sich Ihre Gewinne auszahlen lassen können.

entry.title: رمز إحالة MEXC: 1Q1BF (مكافأة تسجيل MEXC بقيمة 5000 دولار أمريكي في عام 2024)
entry.content:
رمز إحالة MEXC: 1Q1BF (مكافأة تسجيل MEXC بقيمة 5000 دولار أمريكي في عام 2024)

رمز إحالة MEXC "1Q1BF" هو رمز خاص لا يساعدك فقط على تقليل رسوم التداول ولكنه يمكّنك أيضًا من توسيع هذه المزايا لأصدقائك وزملائك المتداولين. في هذه المقالة، نتعمق في مزايا برنامج الإحالة، وشروط المشاركة، ونرشدك إلى كيفية تطبيق هذا الرمز لتعزيز رحلة التداول الشاملة الخاصة بك.

ما هو رمز الإحالة MEXC؟

رمز إحالة MEXC "1Q1BF" هو معرف فريد توفره بورصة MEXC في عام 2024. يمكّن هذا الرمز المستخدمين الحاليين من إحالة الآخرين للمشاركة في التداول على منصة MEXC. يحصل المستخدمون الجدد الذين يقومون بالتسجيل باستخدام رمز الإحالة "1Q1BF" على خصم بنسبة 50% على جميع رسوم التداول ويمكنهم المطالبة بمكافأة تسجيل تصل إلى 5000 دولار أمريكي.
توفر رموز الإحالة عادةً للمستخدمين طريقة مخصصة لدعوة الآخرين، سواء كانوا أصدقاء أو عائلة أو أي شخص حريص على الانضمام إلى منصة MEXC. في بعض الأحيان، قد تكون رموز الإحالة الأوسع متاحة خلال عروض ترويجية أو حملات تسويقية محددة، ولكن لفترة محدودة. البقاء على علم بهذه الفرص أمر حيوي. يمكنك القيام بذلك عن طريق مراقبة موقع MEXC الرسمي أو الإعلانات أو قنوات التواصل الاجتماعي لتلقي التحديثات المصممة خصيصًا لتفضيلات التداول الخاصة بك.

كيفية استخدام رمز الإحالة MEXC 1Q1BF

سجل للحصول على حساب جديد باستخدام رمز إحالة MEXC 1Q1BF لتحصل على مكافأة تسجيل تصل إلى 5000 دولار أمريكي وتمتع بخصم على رسوم التداول يصل إلى 50%!
تقدم MEXC منصة سهلة الاستخدام مع مجموعة واسعة من العملات المشفرة المتاحة للتداول. استفد من الرمز الترويجي الحصري الخاص بنا لبدء التداول على MEXC وتأكد من الاستفادة من الخصم المقدم ومكافأة التسجيل المجانية!
للاستفادة من عرض MEXC، ما عليك سوى اتباع الخطوات التالية:
1. سجل للحصول على حساب جديد باستخدام رمز الإحالة MEXC 1Q1BF.
2. قم بزيارة مركز مكافآت MEXC وأكمل المهام لتحصل على مكافأة تصل إلى 5000 دولار أمريكي.
3. احصل على خصم 50% على رسوم التداول من خلال الاحتفاظ بـ 1000 رمز MX.
تمكنك هذه الإجراءات البسيطة من الاستفادة من مزايا عرض MEXC الترويجي، مما يسمح لك بزيادة مكافآتك المحتملة إلى أقصى حد والاستفادة من نفقات التداول المنخفضة.

كيفية تسجيل حساب باستخدام رمز الإحالة MEXC 1Q1BF

للوصول إلى خصم التداول والحصول على مكافآت التسجيل المحتملة من خلال برنامج إحالة MEXC، ما عليك سوى اتباع هذه الخطوات غير المعقدة:

انتقل إلى صفحة التسجيل MEXC Global.
تأكد من إدخال رمز الإحالة 1Q1BF في الحقل المخصص أثناء التسجيل؛ الرجوع إلى الصورة للتوضيح.
أكمل عملية التسجيل وعملية KYC.
ابدأ التداول عن طريق عمل إيداع.
احتفظ برموز MX، رمز التبادل الأصلي لـ MEXC، واستمتع تلقائيًا بخصم 50% على رسوم التداول. مثيرة، أليس كذلك؟
بالإضافة إلى ذلك، استكشف طرقًا متنوعة لكسب المكافآت:
شارك في تداول العقود الآجلة، وM-Day، ومجموع مكافآت العقود الآجلة للحصول على عروض مغرية.
شارك في مسابقات العقود الآجلة الشهرية التي تضم جوائز كبيرة.
إن الاحتفاظ برمز MEXC الأصلي (MX) يمكن أن يجعلك مؤهلاً للحصول على عمليات إسقاط جوي وعروض ترويجية حصرية على منصة إطلاق MEXC.
لا تضمن لك هذه الإجراءات المباشرة الاستفادة من رسوم التداول المخفضة فحسب، بل تفتح أيضًا الأبواب أمام فرص مجزية متنوعة داخل منصة MEXC.

الأسئلة الشائعة حول رمز الإحالة MEXC

ما هو رمز الإحالة MEXC 2024؟

رمز الإحالة MEXC 2024 هو 1Q1BF.

ما هو رمز الإحالة لمحفظة MEXC؟


رمز الإحالة الخاص بـ MEXC Global هو "1Q1BF"، وهو رمز فريد تم إنشاؤه بواسطة بورصة MEXC. يمكن للمستخدمين الاستفادة من برنامج MEXC التابع للحصول على مكافأة عند التسجيل في حساب تبادل MEXC.

ما هو رمز الاشتراك في MEXC؟

للاستفادة من رمز إحالة MEXC، ما عليك سوى التسجيل للحصول على حساب جديد باستخدام رمز إحالة MEXC 1Q1BF. ومن خلال القيام بذلك، يمكنك المطالبة بمكافأة تسجيل تصل إلى 1000 دولار أمريكي والتمتع بخصم يصل إلى 50% على رسوم التداول! توفر MEXC منصة سهلة الاستخدام وتقدم مجموعة متنوعة من العملات المشفرة للتداول.

ما هي المزايا التي يقدمها رمز الإحالة MEXC 1Q1BF؟

ستستمتع بخصم 50% على رسوم التداول، إلى جانب فرصة المطالبة بمكافآت التسجيل التي تصل إلى 5000 دولار أمريكي على منصة التداول MEXC.

كيف يمكنني المطالبة بمكافأتي على MEXC؟

ما عليك سوى إنشاء حساب، وإجراء إيداع، ويمكنك الحصول على مكافأة تتراوح من 100 دولار إلى 20000 دولار، اعتمادًا على المبالغ المودعة وحجم التداول.

entry.title: Bitget 紹介コード: wgiw9672 (2024 年の Bitget サインアップ ボーナス 1000 USDT) | 新しい Bitget プロモーション コード
entry.content:
Bitget 紹介コード: wgiw9672 (2024 年の Bitget サインアップ ボーナス 1000 USDT) | 新しい Bitget プロモーション コード

Bitget 紹介コードをお探しですか? 2024 年の最新のものは wgiw9672 です。 このコードを使用すると、取引が 30% 割引になります。 さらに、「wgiw9672」プロモーション コードを使用して登録した Bitget の新規ユーザーは、最大 $1000 USDT の限定プロモーション報酬を受け取ることができます。

Bitget 紹介コードとは何ですか?

Bitget アプリ内の「wgiw9672」コードは紹介コードとして機能します。 このコードを入力すると、取引手数料が一貫して削減され、取引が 30% 割引されます。 さらに、紹介コードを友達にシェアすることで、豪華な50％の報酬を受け取るチャンスもあります。 このコードを使用すると、手数料を削減し、潜在的に利益を増やす貴重な機会が得られ、同時に他の人にプラットフォームを紹介することもできます。

ベスト Bitget 紹介コード 2024 とは何ですか?

強く推奨される Bitget 紹介コードは wgiw9672 です。 サインアップ時にこのコードを使用すると、100 ドルの寛大なボーナスを受け取ることができます。 コードを友達と共有すると、実質的な 50% のコミッションを獲得する機会が得られます。 基本的に、これにより、歓迎の報酬として USDT で最大 1000 ドルの最大サインアップ ボーナスを確保できる可能性があります。 これは、追加の特典を利用して取引の旅を始めるための優れた方法であり、同時に他の人が参加して独自の特典を楽しむことを奨励します。

Bitget紹介コードの使い方

Bitget 紹介コードは、まだ取引所に登録していない新規ユーザーが利用できます。 残念ながら、すでにアカウントをお持ちの場合は、紹介コードを使用することはできません。

ただし、Bitget では、プロモーションに参加して報酬を獲得するためのさまざまな機会を他にも提供しています。 これらの代替案を検討してみましょう。

Bitget の初心者向けに、紹介コードを請求するためのステップバイステップのガイドを次に示します。

1. まず Bitget にアクセスし、青い「サインアップ」ボタンをクリックします。
2. KYC および AML 手順で検証されるため、正確なユーザーの詳細を提供します。
3. 紹介コードの入力を求められたら、「wgiw9672」と入力します。
4. 登録プロセスを完了し、必要な検証をすべて満たします。
5. すべての条件が満たされたら、すぐにウェルカムボーナスを受け取ることができます。

このアプローチにより、紹介コードがなくても、新規ユーザーは登録プロセスをスムーズに進め、指定された要件を満たすとウェルカムボーナスにアクセスできるようになります。
Bitgetの推奨紹介コードは何ですか?

Bitget 紹介コードは wgiw9672 です。 Bitget 取引手数料の 30% 割引を申請するには、次の手順に従ってください。
Bitget に新しいアカウントを登録します。
必ず Bitget 紹介コード wgiw9672 を使用してください。

Bitget の紹介ボーナスとは何ですか?

友達を Bitget に招待して、紹介賞金プールの一部を共同で獲得しましょう! 招待した各友達は 50 USDT を獲得でき、ユーザーあたり最大 1,000 USDT を獲得できます。 ユーザーは友人を招待して Bitget に登録することができます。 要件を満たしたら、あなたとあなたの友人の両方が、最大限度まで 50 USDT の取引ボーナスを受け取ります。

Bitget ボーナスを請求するにはどうすればよいですか?

毎日ポイントを獲得し、USDT に交換します。 7 日以内にタスクを完了すると、すべての報酬がアンロックされます。 サインアップして 1,000 USDT 相当のウェルカム パッケージを受け取りましょう。 200 ポイントを獲得するには、最低 50 USDT を入金してください。 少なくとも 50 USDT の最初の取引を実行すると、500 ポイントを獲得できます。

取引手数料の割引は自動的に適用されますか?

絶対に。 Bitget 専用紹介コード wgiw9672 を使用して登録すると、30% 割引が自動的に適用されます。 追加の手順は必要ありません。 取引に飛び込むだけで、すべての手数料がシームレスに 30% 割引されます。

entry.title: Re: Upgrade 2105 to 2205: Error when migrate data is sele...
entry.content:
Hello,

The definition of typecode 10042 was moved from extension b2bcommerce to commerceservices.

 

 
In 2105.26, it started at line 712 of hybris/bin/modules/b2b-commerce/b2bcommerce/resources/b2bcommerce-items.xml.
 
In 2205.0, it starts at line 368 of hybris/bin/modules/commerceservices/resources/commerceservices-items.xml.
 
<itemtype code="FutureStock" autocreate="true" generate="true">
<deployment table="futurestock" typecode="10042" />
<attributes>
<attribute qualifier="productCode" type="java.lang.String">
<modifiers read="true" write="true" search="true" optional="false" />
<persistence type="property" />
</attribute>
<attribute qualifier="quantity" type="java.lang.Integer" >
<description>Amount that will be available</description>
<persistence type="property" />
</attribute>
<attribute qualifier="date" type="java.util.Date" >
<description>Data on which the product will be available</description>
<persistence type="property" />
</attribute>
</attributes>
<indexes>
<index name="productCodeIdx">
<key attribute="productCode" />
</index>
</indexes>
</itemtype>

This kind of issue is described in KBA 3273785, which points to API, Data Model, and Spring Framework Changes.

Regards,
Giuseppe

entry.title: Re: Issues while downgrading from 2211 to 2205
entry.content:
Hello,

If you search for alluicommons in Typecodes and change between patch versions, you can see that extension was introduced in 2211.

As can be seen in Extensions and AddOns, extension alluicommons is Available Since Release 2211.

As described in Upgrading Backoffice Framework from 2205 to 2211 > Moved Themes Deployment, Themes deployment with type code 6404 is moved from backoffice extension to alluicommons extension.

In 2211, the new extension alluicommons contains the definition of typecode 6404 in hybris/bin/modules/platform/alluicommons/resources/alluicommons-items.xml:

<items     xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:noNamespaceSchemaLocation="items.xsd">
    <itemtypes>
        <itemtype code="Theme"
                  extends="GenericItem"
                  autocreate="true"
                  generate="true"
                  jaloclass="com.hybris.backoffice.jalo.Theme">
            <deployment table="Themes" typecode="6404"/>
            ...

In 2205, extension backoffice contains the definition of typecode 6404 in hybris/bin/modules/backoffice-framework/backoffice/resources/backoffice-items.xml contains:

        ...
        <itemtype code="Theme"
                  extends="GenericItem"
                  autocreate="true"
                  generate="true"
                  jaloclass="com.hybris.backoffice.jalo.Theme">
            <deployment table="Themes" typecode="6404"/>
            ...

In 2105, typecode 6404 does not exist, because Themes were introduced in 2205.

If 2211 is running, you can see:

  • in HAC > Maintenance > Deployments (/hac/maintain/deployments) > Types with deployment, if you search for alluicommons, that there is a Typecode 6404
  • in HAC > Console > FlexibleSearch (/hac/console/flexsearch) > SQL Query, if you run SELECT * FROM ydeployments WHERE ExtensionName = 'alluicommons', that there is a similar entry
  • in HAC > Console > FlexibleSearch (/hac/console/flexsearch) > SQL Query, if you run SELECT * FROM ydeployments WHERE Typecode = '6404', that there is only 1 entry

To solve your issue, deploy with (Platform Update Mode) No migration and (Deployment Mode) Recreate.

Regards,
Giuseppe

entry.title: Sale order line item combined
entry.content:
Hello, 

I would like to know about sales order SAP B1

"When I have a same SKU multiple line items and I want that to combined to one line item and added up Quantity in SAP" 

Sale order number : 1001

No:  Item number Quantity 

1  30569             3

2  30569             2

3  30569             3

4  36532             5

How these three line can become one line and add up quantity?

No:  Item number Quantity 

1  30569         8

2  36532         5

This will be great help for our work environment. Sale order length will be sorter and it will be easier to verify delivery.

entry.title: Prerequisites and Post activities during In-place upgrade of windows 2012 to 2019.
entry.content:
Once the Windows upgradation is completed then the respective modules have to check whether all the standard and custom transactions and reports are working as expected.

Step1.

(In our case in SCM Module) we have found that there were many custom enhancements, and few fields were added in the standard tables after upgradation which impacted the functionality of some applications.

Also, we have noticed that some enhancements are deactivated which we have identified in SPAU and SPDD activities.

In our case there we about 1677 SAP notes that got added from different modules 

These need to be segregated based on each module and need to check the impact of the SAP Note

Step3.

These SPAU activities need to be adjusted accordingly which will save in a Transport.

Step4.

Once the SPAU and SPDD activities are completed make sure the development system is working as expected.

Step5.

 Upgradation of Quality system 

challenges- changes in the table where there were additional fields in standard tables when compared to previous version. 

Few SAP notes added automatically during upgradation of windows which impacted the flow of business.

some of the enhancements, especially implicit enhancements will go obsolete after windows upgradation that need identified and steps to be taken to add them again.

Need to check the impact of SAP OSS notes that are added by default during the upgradation process based on the component and version of the upgraded SAP system which impacts the business flow.

Import the SPAU and SPDD activities TR that are created during UED system.

Post UEP upgradation all the relevant TR's need to be imported to the new system for the easy flow of business.

An in-place upgrade allows you to go from an older operating system to a newer one while keeping your settings, server roles, and data intact. This article describes you how to move to a later version of Windows Server by using an in-place upgrade.

 

Thankyou!

entry.title: Long Awaited Transformation for Your Credentials
entry.content:
Not a long time ago, somewhere in a not so remote area, there were two friends who used to be close, play together and share ideas. But one day, due to reasons unknown, a fight broke out between two and decided to go ahead on their separate paths. Before turning back on each other, they agreed on one thing, which is to meet someday to prove who has a better life. 

 

 

But that's not the reason stopping IC from being happy.  He started getting restless as the time was nearing to meet his friend who is doing way better than him. Eventually, he backpacks and went on to explore the solution for his misery and after traveling the length and breadth of Europe, he came across Baba Vanga’s predictions and accepted his fate with mixed emotions, counting the days for 2024. 

 

 

As IC is awaiting on prediction to be true with bated breath since the arrival of 2024, SAP has published its revamped certification program a few days ago. 

Though there is no change introduced with regards to certification hub as a part of transformation but considerable changes introduced for learning hub. 

As you know, we need certification hub access to give certification exams and learning hub access to clear delta exams to keep those certifications active. Until 2024, one of the major concerns for IC is the cost incurred to give the certification exams and keep them active as they are valid only for 90 days from the latest release. 


Learning hub cost before transformation:


Learning hub cost after transformation:

 


As you can see, there is more than 50% reduction in the procurement cost of LH subscription. Apart from this huge benefit, there are a couple of more benefits introduced as a part of the transformation program. 

  • You can now avail 4 certification exams with LH subscription 
  • The validity of certifications increased to one year from your assessment completion date. So the reference point has been changed, earlier validity used to be decided based on the release date but now it's based on your completion date. 

 

Though these changes are not specific to IC, it has created some level playing field which was lacking before. But still there is room for improvement if you compare with industry standards

  • AWS certifications valid for three years and 50% off on renewal 
  • Google cloud certifications valid for two years and 50% off on renewal 
  • Microsoft Azure certifications valid one year but free for renewal 

 

Certification hub seems to be redundant after these changes and can be availed by the consultants who want to complete more than 4 certifications in one go which is a rare use case. SAP may decide its fate based on its future usage. 

Let me know your thoughts until the IC friend comes back after meeting his PE friend to start his career with renewed energy!

See you soon! Venkatesh M

 

Disclaimer: The story is fictional but the pain point is real based on author's interaction with several consultants over the years

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Planning Data Action Advance Formula
entry.content:
@pragi2028 

The solution will depend on whether the percentage of DIRECT deduction is based on Cost center or Costcenter and GL combination. If it is just based on costcenter you can maintain these percentages in property ( type number) of costcenter and use it in DA. If its based on Costcenter and GL then you need to maintain these percentages in system at CC and GL combination and may be other dimension as #.

First approach:

 

MEMBERSET [D/Account]=("A","B","C","D","E")

DATA([d/Account]="Direct") = ATTRIBUTE([d/costcenter].[p/directperc])*RESULTLOOKUP()

 Second Approach

MEMBERSET [D/Account]=("A","B","C","D","E")
DATA([d/Account]="Direct") = RESULTLOOKUP([Account]="DirectPerc") * RESULTLOOKUP()

In RESULTLOOKUP([Account]="DirectPerc") please specify all other dimension as # if you use them to store the percentages.

 

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Allocation Using Advanced Formula with Parent Nodes a...
entry.content:
@bautayakool 

Your code does not give correct result ? or gives result but against wrong costcenter. I think your code would be working but the end result is getting posted against 131210 rather than against driver costcenter.

Try this if its allocating to source cc instead of driver cc

VARIABLEMEMBER #SRCCCTR OF [d/ZCCTR]

DATA([d/ZCCTR]=#SRCCCTR)=RESULTLOOKUP([d/ZCCTR] = "131210", [d/ZACTY_TYPE] = "#")

Now use this in multiplication with drivers.

DATA.APPEND([d/ZACTY_TYPE] = "#", [d/Measures] = "ZAMOUNT") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/ZCCTR] = #SRCCCTR, [d/ZACTY_TYPE] = "#") * RESULTLOOKUP([d/ZACTY_TYPE] = #ACTY, [d/ZGL_ACCOUNT] = "#", [d/Measures] = "ZACTY_QTY") / RESULTLOOKUP([d/ZACTY_TYPE] = #ACTY, [d/ZGL_ACCOUNT] = "#", [d/ZCCTR] = #CCTR, [d/Measures] = "ZACTY_QTY")

 

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Errror using GWSAMPLE_BASIC as an external service in CAP/CDS
entry.content:
Today I was doing some testing with CDS, CAP and external API.

I created a test service and the test.js to connect to ES5 test system.

 

using {GWSAMPLE_BASIC as external} from './external/GWSAMPLE_BASIC';

service Test {
    entity BPSet : external.BusinessPartnerSet {}
    entity CSet : external.ContactSet {}
}

 

When I tried "BPSet" i got an error "'Address_City" not found. After some investigation I found out that there is somethin wrong with the metadata.

The metadata of my test-service look like:

When I use cds watch and check the metadata of gwsample-basic, there is difference in the address fields.

It seems, the complex type Address is replaced by Address_City, Address_Street. Anyone know why this happend and how I can resolve it to use the service?

BR

Miri

entry.title: Freight Generation in Data Collation Document using Freight Rate Table or Pricing Multireference
entry.content:
Table of Contents 

1. Overview 
2. System Used 
3. Perquisites 
4. Configuration

   4.1 Document Supplementation
   4.2 Data Mapping 
   4.3 Freight Cost Item

5. Master Data 

   5.1 General Master Data 
   5.2 Master Data Specific to Freight Rate Table Strategy

6. Conclusion 

 

   ************************************************************************************************************************

 

1. Overview 

Secondary distribution companies in the oil and gas sector face the complex task of transporting bulk hydrocarbon products like gasoline, fuel oil, gas oil, and jet fuel. To facilitate this process, these companies often enlist the expertise of forwarding agents specialized in handling such products.

In this blog, we explore how secondary distribution companies can optimize their transportation services procurement using industry-specific solutions available within SAP S/4HANA Supply Chain for secondary distribution. The process involves a standard selling or transferring procedure for bulk hydrocarbon products, enhanced by the introduction of a Freight Cost Item Category.

By implementing this approach, companies can seamlessly generate a purchase order for transportation services, simplifying the payment process to forwarding agents. Our discussion will delve into the necessary configuration steps, Freight Rate Determination strategies, and essential Master Data considerations to successfully implement this streamlined procurement process.

 

 ************************************************************************************************************************

2. System Used 

S/4HANA on Premise Demo Server, Release 1809.

SAP S/4HANA Supply Chain for secondary distribution | 2.0 SPS06

 ************************************************************************************************************************

3. Perquisites

Understanding of how SAP S/4HANA Supply Chain for secondary distribution works and its required set up, as the blog mainly focuses on the Freight Configuration and not the main processes

If you want to know more about the solution, you can check the below SAP Help Link which provides a good guide.

S4SCSD Guide  

 ************************************************************************************************************************

4. Configuration
4.1 Document Supplementation

In this activity we assign the different Methods the system uses to determine whether the Unloading Item Type is relevant for Freight Cost Item Generation, how the distance is determined and the Freight Item is updated. 

 

Transaction

 SPRO

Path

Industry Solution Oil & Gas (Downstream) > S4SCSD (SAP S/4HANA Supply Chain for Secondary Distribution) > Data Collation (DC) > Process Automation Toolset (PAT) > Processes > General > Define Document Supplementation

 

4.1.1 Define Header Schema

 

4.1.2 Define Item Schema

 

4.1.3 Assign Document Data Supplementation to Document Type

 

4.1.4 Assign Document Data Supplementation to Unloading Item Type

 ************************************************************************************************************************

4.2. Data Mapping 

This controls the Data Transfer from Source Structure Tables to the the Target Tables in the Data Collation Document or PO. 

 

Transaction

 SPRO

Path

Industry Solution Oil & Gas (Downstream) > S4SCSD (SAP S/4HANA Supply Chain for Secondary Distribution) > Data Collation (DC) > Process Automation Toolset (PAT) > Processes > General Settings > Mapping


 4.2.1 Define Mapping Group and Field Assignment

Here you have the option to assign default values that can be mapped to the purchase order (PO) generated. For example, you can set default values for Account Assignment Category and Purchase Document Type to streamline the procurement process.

Note: 

(FREIGHT_IC) is usually used when the unloading or discharge item is with reference to a Sales Document.

(FREIGHT_IS) is usually used when the unloading or discharge item is with reference to a Purchase Document.

 

 

4.2.2  Define the Mapping Schema and Assign the Mapping Groups

 

 

 ************************************************************************************************************************

4.3 Freight Cost Item

This part of the configuration process consists of two main sections: General Configuration and Configuration based on the Freight Rate strategy. 

4.3.1 General Configuration 

 

Transaction

 SPRO

Path

Industry Solution Oil & Gas (Downstream) > S4SCSD (SAP S/4HANA Supply Chain for Secondary Distribution) > Data Collation (DC) > Process Automation Toolset (PAT) > Processes > General Settings > Data Collation documents > Freight Cost Item

4.3.1.1 Set Freight Charge Generation

We assign the Mapping schemas' defined above to the relevant Document and Unloading Item Types.

 

4.3.1.2  Enable Incoterm Determinations

In this step, we specify the Incoterms that, when entered in a Sales Document, trigger the relevance of the item category for generating freight costs.

 

4.3.2 Configuration based on the Freight Rate strategy

We have two approaches for determining freight rates. The first approach utilizes Freight Rate Tables, which considers distance and scale rates. The second approach Pricing Multi-reference involves transferring the amount from a condition type in a reference document (used in the unloading item category) to another condition type in the automatically generated Freight Purchase Order.  

4.3.2.1 Freight Rate Table Approach

Perquisites: 

Implement the following SAP Notes in the specified sequence and execute the post-implementation instructions:

SAP Note 3020961 

SAP Note 3023702 

If the notes have been implemented but the routines are still unavailable, check if the programs are available:

  • FV64A451
  • FV64A452

If these programs are available, you can create custom routines by copying their logic to enable the required functionality.

4.3.2.1.1 Define Conditions for Freight Rate Determination

In this step, we specify the condition type to which the Freight Rate will be transferred. If there are multiple conditions, you can specify the sequence number to prioritize them. For this example, we will use condition type (YPF1).

 

Transaction

 SPRO

Path

Industry Solution Oil & Gas (Downstream) > S4SCSD (SAP S/4HANA Supply Chain for Secondary Distribution) > Data Collation (DC) > Process Automation Toolset (PAT) > Processes > General Settings > Data Collation documents > Freight Cost Item > Define Conditions for Freight Rate Determination

 

4.3.2.1.2 Assign Routine to Condition Type in MM Pricing Schema

Assign Routine (451) to the condition type you need to transfer the Freight Rate to.

 

Transaction

 SPRO

Path

Materials Management > Purchasing > Conditions > Define Price Determination Process > Set Calculation Schema – Purchasing

 

 

4.3.2.2 Pricing Multireference Approach

Perquisites: 

We need to activate the below BAdI to activate Multireference features in the Purchase Order standard screens, (/ICO/MO_TV_BADI_PO - Multireference f. ME2xN Transactions for BADI ME_GUI_PO_CUST). You can activate it by following the below path.

 

Transaction

 SPRO

Path

Industry Solution Oil & Gas (Downstream) > S4SCSD (SAP S/4HANA Supply Chain for Secondary Distribution) > Purchasing > Multireference > System Modifications > Business Add-Ins > Multireference f. ME2xN Transactions for BADI ME_GUI_PO_CUST

 

 

4.3.2.2.1 Assign Reference Document Category to Condition

Here, we specify the Purchasing Pricing Schema to be used in the Freight Purchase Order, along with the condition type to which the rate will be transferred.

 

Transaction

 SPRO

Path

Industry Solution Oil & Gas (Downstream) > S4SCSD (SAP S/4HANA Supply Chain for Secondary Distribution) > General Settings > Pricing > Multireference 

 

4.3.2.2.2 Define Pricing Rules

Here, we define additional settings, including the condition type from which the rate will be transferred. In this case, the condition type is PR00, which is available in the pricing schema of the reference document, such as the sales order.

 

4.3.2.2.3 Assign Routine to Condition Type in MM Pricing Schema

Assign Routine (450) to the condition type you need to transfer the Freight Rate to.

Note:

If you intend to utilize both the Multireference Pricing and the Freight Rate Table approaches simultaneously, it's necessary to use two different condition types. Each condition type will be assigned a different pricing routine.

 

Transaction

 SPRO

Path

Materials Management > Purchasing > Conditions > Define Price Determination Process > Set Calculation Schema – Purchasing

 ************************************************************************************************************************

5. Master Data

We maintain two types of master data: General Master Data and Master Data specific to the chosen Freight Rate strategy.

 

5.1 General Master Data

5.1.1 Set Up Transportation Material Determination

For each product to be transported, we must assign a transportation service material. This ensures that when a Purchase Order is generated to pay the transporter for their services, the system automatically selects the appropriate service material.

TCODE: /ICO/LO_FR_MTMAP_TCD 

 

 

5.1.2 Extend Forwarding Agent

When creating the Forwarding Agent, ensure it is extended to vendor roles (FI and Purchasing) and maintain the assigned Incoterms, Purchase Organization and Purchase Group in the Purchasing View.

TCODE: BP

5.1.3 Create Purchase Info-record 

To enable automatic Purchase Order generation, maintain an Info Record (ME11) for the following combination: Service Transport Material, Purchase Organization, Purchase Group, Vendor (Forwarding Agent), and a dummy price.

TCODE: ME11

 

5.2 Master Data Specific to Freight Rate Table Strategy

5.2.1 Define Distance for Freight

The distance is calculated from the supplying Plant to the Destination, which can be determined by the Receiving Plant Postal Code, Ship-to-Party Code, or Ship-to-Party Postal Code.

  • Plant: Refers to the Supplying Plant.
  • Postal Code: Indicates the postal code of the Ship-to-Party (for Sales Documents) or the Receiving Plant (for Purchase Documents).
  • Forwarding Agent: Can be marked with (*) if the distance is not affected by the specific forwarding agent used.

TCODE: /ICO/LO_FRT_DIST_TCD 

 

5.2.2 Maintain Freight Rate Table 

We can establish freight rates with scales based on specific combinations. For example, if a forwarding agent transports 40 kiloliters of Gasoline 92 over a distance of 70 kilometers, the rate would be 65 EGP per kiloliter, resulting in a total condition value of 2600 EGP for Condition Type YPF1.

TCODE: /ICO/LOVC_FRKOND_TCD 

 ************************************************************************************************************************

6. Conclusion

During the initial implementation of this solution on the actual project, I encountered challenges due to the lack of detailed documentation. Through extensive testing, I gained a deeper understanding of the system's behavior and how the solution operates. I sincerely hope that this blog proves helpful to those facing similar challenges. Your thoughts and comments are highly appreciated, please share them in the comments section below. Thank you for reading!

AG

entry.title: The Role of Enterprise Architecture to Manage SAP's Transformation into the Cloud
entry.content:
SAP’s Marco Michel provides an in-depth analysis of the critical role that Enterprise Architecture (EA) plays in SAP's transformation journey into the cloud. Drawing from SAP's internal experience, Michel outlines the strategies and methodologies that have underpinned this transformative process. He emphasizes the importance of aligning enterprise architecture with SAP's broader business strategy, advocating for a comprehensive understanding of this strategy among architects.

The presentation delves into the necessity of adopting a cloud strategy that supports standardization and automation, enabling SAP to shift from custom-tailored solutions towards a more scalable and efficient cloud service model. Michel highlights the implementation of a capability-driven approach to streamline processes, reduce complexity, and ensure that technology investments are directly tied to strategic business outcomes. This session underscores the significance of governance, data architecture, and a holistic view of the IT portfolio in navigating the challenges and seizing the opportunities presented by the cloud transition.

Main Themes

These themes collectively outline a comprehensive approach to managing SAP's transformation into the cloud, emphasizing strategic alignment, education, simplification, the role of enterprise architecture, governance, and the strategic use of data.

Strategic Alignment and Understanding: The transformation from a solution company to a true cloud company and the emphasis on standardized platform functionality available via subscription align with the strategic alignment theme. SAP's move towards a cloud-first strategy, while not exclusively cloud-only, is highlighted as part of their strategic direction.

Education and Mindset Shift: The talk and slides emphasize the importance of educating the team and broader organization on SAP’s strategic direction towards the cloud, which is crucial for ensuring alignment and fostering a culture of continuous learning and adaptation.

Simplification and Standardization: The slides underscore the move towards simplification and standardization as part of SAP's cloud strategy. This includes leveraging SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) as the foundation and following a principle of "one solution per capability" to support SAP's business capabilities.

Role of Enterprise Architecture: Enterprise Architecture's role is depicted as designing the end-to-end, enterprise-wide architecture to support business goals and ensuring that the target architecture and roadmap are aligned globally across processes, applications, and data.

Governance and Portfolio Management: The establishment of architecture governance mechanisms, such as the Architecture Review Board (ARB) and Design Review Board (DRB), to make educated architectural decisions, collect feedback, and ensure transparency is emphasized. This governance structure supports the strategic IT governance and portfolio management theme.

Data as a Strategic Asset: The importance of building a strong data foundation with the Intelligent Enterprise Data Platform and treating data as a valuable corporate resource is highlighted, aligning with the theme of treating data as a strategic asset.

Agility Within Governance: While the emphasis on agility within governance is not explicitly outlined in the slides, the introduction of governance boards and the strategic use of the LeanIX tool for architecture modeling suggest a framework that balances agility with the need for structured decision-making and alignment.

Remember:

"“The discipline of EA is more important than ever, a strong and business architecture focused EA Practice is key to drive SAP’s digital transformation” -  Marco Michel

Watch the YouTube Video of Marco's Presentation: Here  

CTA
For Enterprise Architect SAP Community Updates and More: Connect with and Follow Paul Kurchina - https://www.linkedin.com/in/paulkurchina/ 

 

Flag Photo with Marco Michel
